title: The Flower in Hell
actors: Hak Kim, Choi Eun-hie, Hae-won Jo
plot: A country bumpkin (Dong-shik) goes to Seoul in order to bring his older brother (Young-shik)back to the country. Little does he know Young-shik is a petty crook involved with a prostitute (Sonia) who is servicing American GIs. The...
